CustomField.description: Formula: IF(nepa_clock_pause_start__c is not null AND nepa_clock_pause_end__c is not null, nepa_clock_pause_end__c - nepa_clock_pause_start__c, 0). Calculated number of suspended days to add back to the statutory deadline.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total days the clock has been suspended. Added to statutory deadline to compute adjusted deadline.
CustomField.label: Clock Pause Days
